backupTargetTitles: Power Platform / Business Process Automation Specialist
mustHaveSignals: 2+ years building and maintaining Power Platform solutions in enterprise M365 context.
Visible Power Apps + Power Automate + SharePoint List delivery examples.
Support-heavy fit: production flow takeover, monitoring, troubleshooting, credential renewal, and user support.
Governance fit: connection references, ownership transfer, environment variables, licensing considerations, role-based access, audit logging, documentation.
Business translation fit: requirements gathered from Legal, Privacy, HR, recruiting, and regional stakeholders and converted into working low-code systems.
End-user enablement fit: TOI documentation, knowledge transfer workshops, training coordination, and clear non-technical stakeholder updates.
KPI communication fit: Copilot adoption dashboard, license conversion tracking, HR dashboards, recruiting metrics, onboarding metrics.
summaryAngle: Power Platform developer with grounded Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, governance documentation, production troubleshooting, and M365 adoption analytics evidence.
recommendedNextAction: Rewrite the CV headline and first summary line to target Power Platform Developer, then make the first Trend Micro bullets show production Power Automate support, Power Apps + SharePoint workflow builds, M365/Copilot adoption analytics, governance documentation, troubleshooting, TOI documentation, and end-user enablement before AI or BI-heavy achievements.
